# Bunofeed

> Clean, natural food brand from Uttar Pradesh, India. Est. 2026.

## Brand
- Mission: Transparent ingredients, no additives, real nutrition
- Email: bunofeedhelpdesk@gmail.com
- Website: https://bunofeed.in

## Products
- [Classic Peanut Butter Smooth](/product.html?id=creamy-pb): 400g jar, Smooth or Crunchy. Ingredients: Roasted Peanut (87.5%), Dhaga Mishri (10%), Pink Salt. ₹299 MRP ₹399. 5% GST. High protein, no trans fat, vegetarian.

- [Shop](/shop.html): Full product catalog

- [Blog](/blog.html): Health and nutrition articles
